raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Napa County Housing Authority will receive $250,000 in matching-dollars each year to support farmworker housing centers.",
    "Napa County is California’s only provider of farmworker housing fully funded by occupant rent and the agricultural industry in partnership with local housing funds.",
    "Napa County is currently the only county that provides year-round housing to the region’s agricultural workers without financial support from the state.",
    "The funding from AB 317 is critical to ensuring that the housing centers in Napa County stay in operation.",
    "The general lack of affordable housing has enhanced the need for farmworker housing centers in Napa County.",
    "California agricultural workers are referred to as the backbone of the Napa Valley's renowned wine industry."
```
